# Global Bali Home

> Premium real estate investment and development holding with three active villa projects in Bali, Indonesia. Founded by Mark Feldman, a Wall Street veteran with 25+ years in finance. Specializes in turnkey villa investments with 10–15% projected annual rental yield. Full-cycle service: land acquisition, design, construction, legal structuring, property management.

## Company facts

- Location: Ubud area, Bali, Indonesia
- Founder: Mark Feldman, Managing Director
- Active projects: 3 villa developments in the Ubud area
- Total inventory: 41 villas across the portfolio
- Price range: Rp 2.27 billion to Rp 20.49 billion per villa
- Projected rental yield: 10–15% annually
- Average occupancy (managed portfolio): ~80%
- Ownership structure for foreigners: Leasehold (Hak Sewa) — 30 years initial + 30 years guaranteed extension
- Languages served: English, Russian
- Property management partner: French operator with 10+ years in Bali

## Projects

- [Serenity Villas](https://globalbalihome.com/project-serenity-villas.html): 12 villas, 2–3 bedrooms, 122–210 m² built area, from Rp 5.77 billion. Handover Q2 2026. Jungle views, natural waterfalls nearby.
- [Serenity Estates](https://globalbalihome.com/project-serenity-estates.html): 4 exclusive villas, 2–5 bedrooms, private pools, from Rp 5.34 billion to Rp 9.99 billion. Boutique development.
- [Serenity Village](https://globalbalihome.com/project-serenity-village.html): 25 villas, 1–2 bedrooms, entry-level pricing from Rp 2.27 billion. Handover Q3 2027.

## Contact

- Email: office@globalbalihome.com
- Phone / WhatsApp: +62 813-251-438-49
- Office address: Ubud, Bali, Indonesia
- Office hours: Monday–Sunday, 09:00–18:00 WITA

## Legal context

- All transactions comply with Indonesian law (UU 7/2011 and PBI 17/3/PBI/2015): IDR is the primary transaction currency, USD shown for reference only.
- Foreign ownership structured via leasehold registered at the local land office, protected under Indonesian civil law.
- All contracts prepared by licensed Indonesian notaries in English and Bahasa Indonesia.
- Construction insurance covers each project during the build phase.
